_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Product delivery involves ensuring that a product or service is developed in a timely and cost-effective way, meeting the user needs.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of product management practices as applied to data products, including roadmap prioritization, consumer discovery, feedback loops, and value measurement.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-016 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-T-010 (DQ, cosine: 0.465), TF-A-004 (TF, cosine: 0.377).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.0/10 (raw 0.305). Shared vocabulary: [product]. DDaT-only terms [cost, delivery, developed, effective, ensuring, involves] vs WIDAI-only terms [applied, consumer, data, discovery, feedback, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.870, R=0.866). Balanced P/R — the 21-word DDaT element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Product delivery involves ensuring that a product or service is developed in a t" and "Knowledge of product management practices as applied to data products, including" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.450 > STS 0.305 (gap +0.145). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [product] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.3%. Shared tokens: [product]. DDaT-only: [cost, delivery, developed, effective, ensuring, involves]. WIDAI-only: [applied, consumer, data, discovery, feedback, knowledge].
